content.en:
"There is a big move in the Heavenly Emperor Palace?"

Ye Tian was surprised, and hurriedly asked, "Jiu'er, where did you get the information?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said: "It's not convenient to say the source of intelligence now, but I can tell you for sure that it is true! And this time the action is very big, I am afraid that there will be countless True Ancestors and a large number of Dao Ancestors who have fallen, so if you can not get involved, don't get involved! Even if you get involved, don't let your relatives participate, otherwise the possibility of them falling is too great!"

"What the hell?"

Ye Tian asked solemnly.

Ouyang Jiu'er said seriously: "Let me tell you the truth, the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has always been to provoke the major forces to fight, so that a large number of living beings will fall, especially at the Dao Ancestor level, the more Dao Ancestors who fall, the better." "

"Why?" Ye Tian frowned, "It is said that the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is very strong, if they make a move, it should not be difficult to kill a large number of Dao Ancestors and destroy a large number of sects, there is no need to do this, right?

Ouyang Jiu'er shook his head and said, "They don't dare to make a move, otherwise if other forces unite, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will also be afraid." Do you really think that the major forces don't have hole cards? For example, Black Wind Mountain, its strength is very mysterious. As for why they let so many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors die in the pit, it is mainly related to the forbidden world. Do you think the Forbidden Realm was born so easily? They used a method similar to blood sacrifice to make the Xuanxu Ancient Realm grow continuously at the cost of the lives of countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, and eventually evolved into the Forbidden Realm. But because the number of Dao Ancestors has fallen a lot less recently, they have been planning a big thing recently, preparing to kill a large number of Dao Ancestors!"

"If the plan is leaked, won't the Heavenly Emperor Palace fall short?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "Even if the plan is leaked, many people still can't help but jump in, because this time the opportunity is indeed too big, and the arms of the Heavenly Emperor Palace are big enough to cause a large number of Dao Ancestors to go crazy!"

Under Ouyang Jiu'er's narration, Ye Tian finally understood what the Heavenly Emperor Palace's plan was this time.

A large forbidden treasure is about to be born!

Moreover, the Heavenly Emperor Palace even placed a forbidden treasure that could evolve into the future in that large forbidden treasure land, which was a forbidden treasure that all Dao ancestors could not ignore.

However, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was also reluctant to hand over the Forbidden Treasure, so it made many settings, which were completely locked with the Forbidden Treasure Land, except for the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, no one else could take it away, so they could only enter the Forbidden Treasure Land and use the Forbidden Treasure to evolve the future road.

Moreover, the value of a large forbidden treasure land is too great, a forbidden treasure land like a forbidden mountain range or a forbidden forest can only be regarded as an ordinary forbidden treasure land, and a forbidden treasure land like a forbidden ancient well can be regarded as a medium-sized forbidden treasure land, and it is not a top-notch medium-sized forbidden treasure land, but it has barely reached the threshold of a medium-sized forbidden treasure land.

It is also conceivable from this that how many forbidden treasures and forbidden treasures will be born in the large-scale forbidden treasure land!

Under normal circumstances, a large forbidden treasure land would definitely give birth to more than ten forbidden treasures, which was enough to make both the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor crazy.

"The Heavenly Emperor Palace can be said to have paid a huge price this time, they couldn't help but not take away the forbidden treasure of that large forbidden treasure land, and also put in a forbidden treasure, just to kill those Dao Ancestors! Can you imagine, how many Dao Ancestors will enter this time?"

"What's more, that large forbidden treasure land can initially shield the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, although it is difficult for the Dao Ancestors to exert their strength, they can hold on for a long time, so that they will not be forced to sleep and seal after coming out for a while. Therefore, in the large-scale forbidden treasure land, the battle will definitely be extremely tragic!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian was silent, I have to say, even he was moved, he knew it was dangerous, but he still wanted to go in.

It is conceivable that even if other Dao Ancestors knew that this was a conspiracy, they would definitely break in and compete for those opportunities.

For example, who doesn't want to take a look at the road to the future of evolution?

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors have come to an end, and they are very confused about the future, if they take a look at the future path, they are expected to break the shackles and be promoted to a higher level!

Ye Tian knew very well that if Ouyang Jiu'er didn't say it, he didn't know about that large forbidden treasure land, maybe he would really take Xiao Yue and a pair of children in.

After all, Xiao Yue's strength has also reached the realm of Invincible True Ancestor, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue are Supreme True Ancestors, their strength has improved rapidly, and they have obtained Dao-level natal talent, it is estimated that it will not be long before they can grow to the top of the Supreme Dao Ancestor's combat power.

When the time comes, with the help of the Star Blade and the Star Moon Blade, they will be able to fight against the weaker Invincible True Ancestor.

Therefore, they are not weak, and they probably want to enter the forbidden treasure land to take a look.

In that case, once a big war broke out, he would not be able to protect his relatives at all.

Once his relatives fall, he can't believe what kind of mentality he has, and he will probably collapse and go crazy!

"Jiu'er, thank you for reminding me!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"It's nothing, but you don't leak it out, otherwise once the Heavenly Emperor Palace finds out, they will even kill you at all costs!" Ouyang Jiu'er reminded.

"Yes, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

-------------------

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The three palace masters were discussing the plan for a large forbidden treasure land.

"True Martial Palace Master, has the matter been dealt with?" asked the Green Dragon Palace Master.

"Deal with it!" "The True Martial Palace Lord said: "I personally put the Haotian Emperor Mirror, a medium forbidden treasure, in the forbidden treasure land, but this price is a bit big, in case something goes wrong, it is a Haotian Emperor Mirror that is comparable to a high-level taboo treasure!"

"And if you are willing to give it, you will reap the rewards. Moreover, to open the Haotian Emperor Mirror, a strange forbidden treasure, requires a large amount of true ancestor and Dao Ancestor's blood, otherwise the power of the Dao Ancestor itself will not last long, and those invincible Dao Ancestors or supreme Dao Ancestors will inevitably kill on a large scale in order to open the future path for themselves in order to open the Haotian Emperor Mirror! Otherwise, according to today's progress, it will be too slow and too slow!Could it be that you really want to wait for hundreds of millions of years?" said the main of the Qinglong Palace.

"Okay, since the plan has been decided, let's implement it, there's no need to discuss this!"

The White Tiger Palace Lord spoke.

"Hmm!"

The Qinglong Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Lord nodded and stopped discussing this.

The three palace masters studied the plan in detail, when to expose that large forbidden treasure land, once there was a change, how to deal with it?

They all have to think through these issues to ensure that the plan is completed perfectly.

The years passed, and 100,000 years passed.

Ye Tian's current True Ancestor power, physical body power, and soul power had reached the extreme after cultivating the forbidden technique, and no matter how much he cultivated the forbidden technique, it was difficult to improve.

In addition, the Thousand Dao Technique of the Vajra Battle Body has also been cultivated to the extreme realm, and it can no longer be improved.

And it is difficult for the forbidden body to continue to improve after refining to sixty percent, and now it has not even reached the progress of sixty percent and one, as if it has fallen into shackles.

The only thing that has some progress is the forbidden path, and he has realized a few more forbidden paths, which is good news, but it is still a long way from understanding all the forbidden paths.

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat, and he felt that the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm was shaken, and something big had happened.

The human race, countless true ancestors came out of the customs, looking for the source of the shock.

Ye Tian knew very well that a large forbidden treasure land had been born.

He had no way to stop the true ancestors of the human race, so he could only try to convey a message that the forbidden treasure land was extremely dangerous, and even if the invincible true ancestor entered, it would be a life of nine deaths.

As for whether anyone will listen to him at that time, then he can't care.

If there were really a large number of Terran True Ancestors who had fallen in, it would be because their lives were not hard enough and their luck was not good enough.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue came to Ye Tian for the first time.

"Father, what's going on, why is the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm shaking, and I feel like there is a taboo rule permeating the place!" Ye Xingchen asked.

"There should be a large forbidden treasure land born, but this time, you are not allowed to go!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Why?" Ye Xingchen frowned.

"Because this time it's a conspiracy, I'm afraid that countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors will fall in that large forbidden treasure land, and even the strongest Dao Ancestor will fall. Others can't help but go in because they're greedy, but you can't go in. If there is a great harvest, I will bring it to you. If you go, I won't be able to protect you!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Being able to make Ye Tian say something that couldn't protect them, Ye Xingchen understood the danger.

He is not stupid, he knows that his father must have inside information, but it is inconvenient to say it.

At this time, he should not make trouble for his father, but he must be noisy to go in.

So, Ye Xingchen said: "Father, I just don't go!"

Ye Xingyue was also very sensible, and hurriedly said, "Father, I'm not going either!"

Xiao Yue and Ye Yu listened to Ye Tian's words very much, and they didn't like killing very much, so they didn't plan to go.

But Ye Tian was ready to go, but he didn't go with his own body, but let the copy body - the Nine Extremes Heaven pass!

In this case, even if the Nine Extremes Heavenly General fell to the large forbidden treasure land, he would have no effect!
